hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.(tsx?|astro)$'; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx astro check --minimumSeverity error 2>&1 | tail -5; fi

FILE_PATH=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'components/ui/'; then echo 'Do not edit shadcn/ui components directly. Use npx shadcn@latest add <component> instead.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
